# REVO

> REVO is a pre-launch community fitness visibility movement from India. We transform everyday physical activities—like running, walking, or cycling—into shared, visible marks on a live neighborhood map. Unlike traditional fitness tracking apps that focus on private stats and competition, REVO makes consistency and community effort visible to encourage local connection.

## Details
- **Target Audience**: Runners, walkers, and cyclists aged 18–40 in Indian cities (e.g., Mumbai, Delhi, Bengaluru, Pune).
- **Origin**: Made in India.
- **Launch Status**: Pre-launch waitlist phase (claiming founding handles, reserving early access).
- **Pricing**: Free to join and use.

## Core Resources
- [REVO Homepage](https://revo.origina.in): Join the waitlist and view waitlist counts.
- [REVO Journal](https://revo.origina.in/blog): Insights on fitness psychology, habit consistency, and community efforts.
- [Privacy Policy](https://revo.origina.in/privacy): Privacy policy and data storage protocols.
- [Terms of Service](https://revo.origina.in/terms): Terms of service.
